page_metadata.biotools__summary: PromoterCAD is a web server for designing synthetic promoters in plants with altered transcriptional regulation. PromoterCAD uses published high-throughput expression and motif data from Arabidopsis thaliana to guide DNA design.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PromoterCAD is a web server for designing synthetic promoters in plants with altered transcriptional regulation. PromoterCAD uses published high-throughput expression and motif data from Arabidopsis thaliana to guide DNA design.
